CREATE TABLE test_paths (id INT, file_path VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_paths (id, file_path) VALUES (1, sprintf('%s/banner.html', http_root()));
INSERT INTO test_paths (id, file_path) VALUES (2, sprintf('%s/about.html', http_root()));
INSERT INTO test_paths (id, file_path) VALUES (3, sprintf('%s/contact.html', http_root()));
SELECT file_path FROM test_paths WHERE id = 1;
SELECT file_path FROM test_paths WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_paths WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY');
SELECT t1.file_path, &http_root() AS root_path FROM test_paths AS t1 JOIN test_paths AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.id < 3;
SELECT DISTINCT sprintf('%s/%s', http_root(), file_path) AS full_path FROM test_paths;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_paths WHERE file_path LIKE sprintf('%s/%%', http_root());
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_paths AS SELECT sprintf('%s/archive.html', http_root()) AS file_path;
SELECT file_path FROM temp_paths WHERE file_path IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_paths AS t2 WHERE t2.id = t1.id) AS path_count FROM test_paths AS t1;
DELETE FROM test_paths WHERE file_path = sprintf('%s/about.html', http_root());
